name: llm-wiki
description: Spawn and operate a namespaced LLM wiki inside any repository.

interface.shortDescription: Spawn and maintain agent-readable wiki workspaces.
interface.longDescription: Create a safe .llm-wiki workspace in a target repository, inspect its status, and route future source and knowledge work through the generated agent runbook.
defaultPrompt: Initialize an LLM wiki in this repo.
Check this repo's LLM wiki status.
Route this source into the LLM wiki.
